title: The Emperors Face the Worst Generation
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Kaido, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The All-Stars and the Flying Six were defeated?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Then again, those wins are meaningless...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...as long as those two monsters are still standing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As events unfold, this conflict approaches a potentially disastrous end.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should Luffy Manage to triumph over Kaido, the flame clouds holding onigashima would dissipate and the island would come crashing down...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That would ignite the gunpowder stores in the castle's basement, resulting in an explosion that would consume the flower capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Countless people are enjoying the fire festival...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They remain unaware of the fact that their lives could be snuffed out at any moment!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A manifestation of Kanuuro's hatred heads for that same basement,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: spurred on by the words of Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It may explode onigashima in mid-air...

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Fortunately, YAMATO is in hot pursuit!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to fight him for the key. I'm counting on you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ATTIC BETWEEN THE IST AND 2ND FLOOR

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't let up!! They're with the Red Scabbards and Straw hats!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm surrounded by fire and enemies!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is it!! I'm a goner!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: U-USOP-DONO... FORGET ME, JUST TAKE KIKU...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, KINEMON- SAMA... I AM TOO FAR GONE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sounds good! I'll leave you both and escape!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait!! That would make this rescue attempt pointless!! What is it with you Samural having death wishes?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't get this obsession with honor and committing seppuku!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know it's your culture, but I can't stand it!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 52 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
